modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about using different styles in Word documents

full_description_text: I'm having trouble figuring out how to use the different styles in Word. I want to know what the various styles are and how to properly apply the heading options. It seems like I'm not getting the hang of it, and I could really use some guidance on this.
short_description: Confusion about using different styles in Word documents
description: I'm having trouble figuring out how to use the different styles in Word. I want to know what the various styles are and how to properly apply the heading options. It seems like I'm not getting the hang of it, and I could really use some guidance on this.
